name: happy-path-name-captured-and-flow-progresses
description: Smoke test: a fresh user says they want a website, gives a business name, and the bot captures the name + advances out of SALES_CHAT into the wizard. Strictly two turns to keep the fixture stable across LLM non-determinism — deeper field assertions live in the focused fixtures (01-22). What this fixture protects: the absolute basics — bot doesn't crash on a fresh user, name capture works, state machine moves forward.

turns.user: I want to make a website for my plumbing business
